title: eriogonum nudicaule subsp. angustum
intro: Eriogonum nudicaule subsp. angustum, also known as sulphur-flower buckwheat, is a flowering plant species in the buckwheat family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum nudicaule subsp. angustum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
